methods.description: This method involves directly exposing pollen samples to a combination of static and sinusoidal magnetic fields during different stages of pollen development to study the effects of ELF-MF exposure.

steps.description: Pollen samples were directly exposed to the combination of static (10 ± 1 µT oriented downward) and sinusoidal MFs (16 Hz, 10 μT) during rehydration (30 min), germination (3 h), or both (3 h 30 min).
steps.searchable_summary: Expose pollen samples to static and sinusoidal magnetic fields during rehydration and germination

steps.description: Petri dishes of control groups were always kept outside the solenoid (2 m from the device).
steps.searchable_summary: Maintain control group outside magnetic field exposure area

methods.description: This method involves preparing pollen growth medium with water that has been pre-exposed to magnetic fields, to indirectly study the effects of ELF-MF exposure on pollen development.

steps.description: The pollen growth medium was prepared with water aliquots exposed for 8 or 24 h to the static MF at 10 µT oriented downward, plus the 16-Hz sinusoidal MF at 10 µT.
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare growth medium with water pre-exposed to magnetic fields

steps.description: Conditioned water was utilized 0, 1, or 8 h after the end of ELF-MF exposure.
steps.searchable_summary: Use conditioned water at specified intervals after exposure

methods.description: This method ensures unbiased results by blinding the samples and replicating the experiments independently.

steps.description: Experiments were blinded with coded samples; a person not involved in carrying out the experiments coded the samples with a random letter code.
steps.searchable_summary: Blind samples with random letter codes

steps.description: The code was kept secret until all measurements and basic data processing were completed.
steps.searchable_summary: Keep sample codes secret until data processing is complete

steps.description: Each experiment was independently replicated three times on different days.
steps.searchable_summary: Replicate experiments independently on different days
